summary: Phase 6 parity re-verification over the LIVE launched Captain's Fish & Chicken site. Per the Phase 2 imageSlotPlan the existing asset library is REUSED, not regenerated (~186 Higgsfield credits saved). The Higgsfield manifest (scripts/image-prompts.json, 94 slots = 87 menu-item renders + 7 marketing heroes/og/logo), the selections ledger (scripts/selections.json, 94 variant selections), and the exported assets under public/ were all re-verified against this run. higgsfield-workflow verify reports ok:true with zero problems and zero deferred slots. All 94 manifest output_files exist on disk; the home beach-loop video and its webp poster/keyframes exist. A full dist/ sweep of 38 built pages resolves all 94 unique image/video references with zero broken refs, all hero images are modern-format webp (modern-format gate satisfied), every one of 138 tags carries alt text, and the visible 'Photos are representational' honesty note is present on menu pages. Desktop and mobile UI checks pass; zero unresolved issues. Logo is a raster placeholder pending owner file drop (noted, non-blocking). No assets were regenerated; no credits spent.
checklist: read-phase2-image-slot-plan: DONE - imageSlotPlan read from packet.inputEvidence.phase2; mandates REUSE of the existing 93+ asset library, no new slots invented.
read-phase4-build-routes: DONE - packet.inputEvidence.phase4 routesGenerated (38 routes) and buildResult (Astro 6 static build passed) read; imagery re-verified against the built dist/.
read-phase5-validation-results: DONE - packet.inputEvidence.phase5 read; failures [] empty, remainingAdvisories are cosmetic/OG/hours-source gaps, none block imagery.
read-specialist-skill: DONE - higgsfield SKILL.md read; used higgsfield-workflow verify as the authoritative verification path.
fill-phase-artifact: DONE - artifact filled with manifest/selections/exports/verificationReport evidence.
inspect-before-complete: DONE - inspect-artifact run and returned problems: [].
review-notes-file: N/A for builder - reviewer (imagery-quality) notes travel by --notes-file at the review gate, not authored here.

marketingSlots: brand-logo -> public/logo.png (site-wide, required:true, placeholder pending owner file drop)
notes: All 94 slots carry reference_status generate-from-scratch (no client reference photo required); reuse is at the export level - assets already exist on disk from the archived run.

Manifest count matches the Phase 2 imageSlotPlan (87 menu-item renders for the unchanged menu + 7 marketing heroes/og/logo). Home beach-loop video is a separate video asset, not an image manifest slot.
No image slots were added or removed; the manifest is stable versus the live 2026-07-08 asset set.
Every one of the 94 manifest slots has exactly one selection of kind 'variant' with a source path under output/images/generated/<slot-id>/ and a provenance string (higgsfield-mcp:<model>:r<round>).
Selection count (94) equals manifest slot count (94); no slot is missing a decision and no redo/blocked-for-real-photo states remain open.

supportingAssets: public/videos/beach-loop.mp4 - home hero loop video EXISTS (6.38 MB).
public/images/hero/beach-loop-a.webp - home hero video poster EXISTS; beach-loop-b.webp and beach-loop-c.webp keyframes also present.
public/logo.png - brand logo raster placeholder EXISTS (pending owner file drop, non-blocking).
public/images/og/og-social.jpg - Open Graph social image EXISTS on disk (OG meta tags not yet wired into templates - Phase 5 advisory, not a Phase 6 blocker).
notes: All 94 manifest output_files were confirmed to exist on disk under public/ via filesystem existence check; 0 missing.
higgsfield-workflow verify (the specialist's authoritative verifier) reports ok:true, problems:[], and zero deferred slots/pages.
No export was regenerated or overwritten this phase; existing exports were re-verified in place.

verificationReport.verificationTarget: Built dist/ (38 pages, Phase 4 build artifactHash 74ac0805e884305f9514ca1376aec8935dae65a0b75ff0f9f8c418ac80dd2059) cross-checked against on-disk public/ assets. Live origin https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app returns HTTP 200 for / and /menu/ (serving pre-deploy content until Phase 7 deploys this build).
verificationReport.summary: Static-site imagery verification against the built dist/ HTML and on-disk public/ assets. 94 unique image/video references across 38 pages all resolve to existing files (0 broken). All 5 hero references are modern-format webp. All 138 tags carry alt text. Home hero uses /videos/beach-loop.mp4 with poster /images/hero/beach-loop-a.webp. Menu item cards reference existing per-item renders and pages carry the visible 'Photos are representational' honesty note. Sticky mobile call bar (tel: call-only) present as a layout singleton. Zero unresolved issues.

checks: All generated imagery is labeled representational; the visible 'Photos are representational' note is present on menu pages and every menu-item alt text ends with '(representational image)'.
No imagery is presented as a real photograph of the premises.
Brand logo (public/logo.png) is a raster placeholder pending an owner file drop; noted as a follow-up, not a launch blocker. No route impact on swap.
Open owner-photography slot remains available to replace representational renders when the owner supplies real photos; no route impact.
Home hero video (/videos/beach-loop.mp4) present with webp poster; landing/occasion heroes render from existing webp files.
All 94 image/video references resolve to existing assets; 0 broken references across 38 pages.
Every has alt text (138/138); menu-item alts carry the representational qualifier.
Hero imagery is modern-format webp (modern-format gate pass).
Menu-item cards reference existing per-item renders under public/images/menu/; 'Photos are representational' note visible on menu pages.
Sticky mobile call bar (.sticky-call-bar, tel: call-only) present as a layout singleton; 3 tel: CTAs on the home page.
Same resolved image/video reference set as desktop (static site, responsive CSS); 0 broken references.
Images carry width/height and loading=lazy/decoding=async, and heroes are webp, keeping mobile payload light.
Representational honesty note and alt text present identically on the mobile-rendered markup.

acknowledgedNonBlockingAdvisories: Open Graph / Twitter Card meta tags absent on all 38 pages (Phase 5 advisory); og-social.jpg asset exists on disk for a future template round. Not a Phase 6 imagery blocker.
Brand logo is a placeholder pending owner file drop; swap is drop-in with no route impact.
Runtime CWV/Lighthouse is out of scope for static imagery verification; route to local-launch-checklist after the Phase 7 deploy.
